meaning: n.努比亚(非洲东北部一地区,历史上曾为一古国)
examples: This statue was found in Temple t at Kawa, in Upper Nubia.
Based on the features of geomorphology and strata in the crossing area, the Nubia sandstone is selected to be the surrounding rock.
Tomb paintings of the New Kingdom show that Nubia was regarded as one of the four corners of the world, over which Egypt had control.
Should your Z5 require a repair, Nubia will also provide a temporary unit to keep you going for the time being.
The Centre for Nubian Studies at the Nubia Museum in Aswan and the National Museum of Egyptian Civilization in Cairo were created with UNESCO support.
